title: Fixture Literature
intro: A tiny frozen unit used by the golden render test. It exists only under tests/golden/fixtures and never appears in the real corpus.
Entries cover a linked author with a nested work, a second linked author, and an author with no page to exercise the red-link path.

sections.name: Nigerian Fiction
sections.blurb: Postwar Nigerian novelists writing in English, from folk-inflected quest narratives onward.

entries.note: Nigerian novelist of Yoruba folk-quest narratives written in nonstandard English.

works.note: Quest novel whose narrator follows his dead palm-wine tapster into the Deads' Town.

entries.note: Modernist poet of Heavensgate who died fighting for Biafra.
Deliberately has no topic page, so this entry must render as a red link.
